empty.title: You don't have any storages yet
empty.description: Create your first storage to centralize your inventory and optimize operations across your business.
empty.noStoragesSubtitle: Create your first storage to start managing your inventory
empty.noResults: No storages found with that name
empty.noResultsSubtitle: Check that the search term is correct or try a different filter.
empty.noTypeResultsSubtitle: Create your first storage of this type to manage it from here.
empty.noFilterResultsSubtitle: Try selecting a different status or clearing your search.

valueCards.centralizationDesc: All your inventory in one place, accessible from anywhere.
valueCards.optimizationDesc: Automate restocking and reduce waste with smart alerts.
valueCards.rolesPermissionsDesc: Control who can see and manage each storage area.

suggestionCards.checkSpellingDesc: Make sure the search terms are spelled correctly.
suggestionCards.adjustFiltersDesc: Try removing some active filters to broaden results.
suggestionCards.createNewDesc: If it doesn't exist yet, create a new storage now.

error.title: We couldn't load your storages
error.description: Something went wrong while loading your storages. This may be a temporary issue.

troubleshooting.connectionDesc: Make sure you're connected to the internet.
troubleshooting.refreshDesc: Sometimes a simple refresh solves the problem.
troubleshooting.supportDesc: If the problem persists, our team can help.

upgrade.title: Upgrade your plan to unlock more storages

tierLimit.title: Plan limit reached
tierLimit.description: Upgrade to create more storages of this type.

banner.title: Unlock the full potential of your storages
banner.description: Get unlimited storages, advanced roles, and more with a premium plan.

archiveModal.title: Archive storage
archiveModal.description: Are you sure you want to archive {{name}}? It will no longer appear in active views.
archiveModal.lastActiveWarning: This is the last active {{type}} storage. You cannot archive it.

restoreModal.title: Restore storage
restoreModal.tierLimitWarning: Restoring this storage would exceed your tier limit for {{type}}.

errors.nameTaken: A storage with this name already exists

createDrawer.title: New storage
createDrawer.subtitle: Configure the details for your new storage.
createDrawer.step1Subtitle: Select the category that best describes this space.
createDrawer.step2Subtitle: Complete the basic information for this storage.
createDrawer.warehouseDesc: Space dedicated to long-term merchandise storage with mass stock control.
createDrawer.storeRoomDesc: Agile storage area for daily supplies and frequent product rotation.
createDrawer.customRoomDesc: Define specific parameters for non-conventional or mixed spaces.
createDrawer.namePlaceholderWarehouse: E.g. Central Warehouse, North Distribution Warehouse
createDrawer.namePlaceholderStoreRoom: E.g. Back store room, Emergency stock
createDrawer.namePlaceholderCustomRoom: E.g. Downtown Store, Polanco Branch, Counter
createDrawer.fixedIconWarehouse: Warehouse type does not allow customization.
createDrawer.fixedIconStoreRoom: Store Room type does not allow customization.
createDrawer.tierLimitWarning: You already have {{count}}/{{max}} {{type}} in your {{tier}} plan. Upgrade to add more.
createDrawer.serverError: We couldn't create the storage. Check your connection and try again. Your data was not lost.
createDrawer.nameTakenError: A storage with that name already exists. Choose a different one so your team can tell them apart.
createDrawer.cancelConfirmBody: You will lose all entered data. This action cannot be undone.
